name: ollama
description: Local LLM runner via Ollama (free, on-premise, CPU/GPU)

host.description: Ollama API endpoint (override with OLLAMA_URL env)

model.description: Default model (must be pulled on Ollama)

timeout.description: Request timeout in seconds (higher for CPU inference)

context_length.description: Context window size passed as num_ctx to Ollama

auto_pull.description: Automatically pull model if not available on Ollama
